body_html:
FYI

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: "McCarroll, James C." <JMcCarroll@ReedSmith.com>
Date: November 2, 2007 7:52:50 PM EDT
To: <tvaldmanis@dgi-nyc.com>
Cc: "Panos Katsambas" <panos@famnyc.com>, "CMeyering@Sciensam" <CMeyeringSciensam@scienscapital.com>, <dkiesq@aol.com>, "Karides, Constantine" <CKarides@ReedSmith.com>, "Gotthoffer, Lance" <LGotthoffer@ReedSmith.com>
Subject: Bear Stearns -- Domestic and Overseas Election-Related Documents

Thor-

Neither of the attached may be disseminated to any outside party at this
time.  I am forwarding them to you solely so that you can begin to think
of how best to utilize them with the media when we are ready to make
either the actual documents, or their substantive contents, public.

We look forward to speaking with you over the weekend.

-Jim

James C. McCarroll
jmccarroll@reedsmith.com
Reed Smith LLP
Direct Tel.:  212-549-0209
Main Line:  212-521-5400
Facsimile:  212-521-5450
599 Lexington Avenue
New York, New York  10022
View Bio

* * *

This E-mail, along with any attachments, is considered confidential and may well be legally privileged. If you have received it in error, you are on notice of its status. Please notify us immediately by reply e-mail and then delete this message from your system. Please do not copy it or use it for any purposes, or disclose its contents to any other person. Thank you for your cooperation.
* * *
To ensure compliance with Treasury Department regulations, we inform you that, unless otherwise indicated in writing, any U.S. Federal tax advice contained in this communication  (including any attachments) is not intended or written to be used, and cannot be used, for the purpose of (1) avoiding penalties under the Internal Revenue Code or applicable state and local provisions or (2) promoting, marketing or recommending to another party any tax-related matters addressed herein.
Disclaimer Version RS.US.1.01.03

body_html:
FYI

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: "McCarroll, James C." <JMcCarroll@ReedSmith.com>
Date: November 2, 2007 7:56:05 PM EDT
To: <dkiesq@aol.com>
Cc: "Karides, Constantine" <CKarides@ReedSmith.com>, "Gotthoffer, Lance" <LGotthoffer@ReedSmith.com>
Subject: FW: Bear Stearns -- Domestic and Overseas Election-Related Documents

Darren-

The attached notice from Bear Stearns reflects a material development
with regard to the overseas fund, which may present us with substantial
opportunities effecting both the domestic and overseas funds.  The other
attached document is a letter we sent to Bear today, just to turn up the
heat a bit on the domestic election.

We will have a call at 4:00 tomorrow (I will be sending around a dial-in
shortly) to discuss next steps, particularly with regard to the overseas
fund, but also potentially effecting the domestic election.  We hope you
will be able to join.

-Jim

James C. McCarroll
jmccarroll@reedsmith.com
Reed Smith LLP

Facsimile:  212-521-5450
